Fixture Detail Title

1,234 views 27 April 2026

Sinopsis

This is a long-form synopsis used by the contentBody parser. It needs to be longer than eighty characters so the heuristic fires and treats it as the synopsis text.

Genre: Drama, Action, Romance.

Producers: Acme Studio, Beta Productions

Duration: 24 min

Size: 720P : 312.5 MB, 1080P : 612.0 MB

Catatan: Fixture file for nk-cli unit tests.
